name: TestGetWaitPDUsTPTCPSrcPort
title: TestGetWaitPDUsTPTCPSrcPort
description: If a PDU was received via TCP that triggered the last wait function, with form 1 the TCP source port can be requested.
Form 2 can only be used for joined events. The number of the joined event (return value of TestJoin...) is here being used as an index.
